commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer judgment on the timeout contract and merge-risk tradeoff.; Cleared: The diff only changes media-understanding timeout control flow, focused tests, and docs; it does not touch dependencies, CI, credentials, permissions, or package resolution. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes image-understanding timeout handling so setup and provider request phases use the full configured timeout independently, updates phase-specific errors, adds focused tests, and clarifies the docs.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main subtracts setup latency from the provider request timeout and clamps exhausted budgets to 1ms. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer judgment on the timeout contract and merge-risk tradeoff.
